title: Command Picture Hanging Strips, Value Pack - 8 Pairs of Medium (16 Strips), 8 Pairs of Large (16 Strips) - For Pictures, Frames, Mirrors, Wall décor - Damage Free Hanging
features: DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes and sticky residue on your walls; Command Picture Hanging Strips are easy to use and help you decorate your walls without leaving any marks

NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Command Picture Hanging Strips are self adhesive and easy to apply; Hang picture frames, wall art, small mirrors, wall clocks, signs, dry erase boards, and other home decor without nails, screws and tools

EASY CLEAN REMOVAL: Command Picture Hanging Strips, a damage-free hanging solution can be removed without leaving any residue; Lightly hold the top of the removable adhesive strip and slowly pull straight down towards the floor to remove decor and prevent damage of walls and surfaces

STRONG AND VERSATILE: 2 pairs of medium strips can hold one frame weighing up to 2.5 kg, and measuring up to 30 cm by 45 cm; 2 pairs of large strips can hold one frame weighing up to 3.5 kg, and measuring up to 45 cm by 60 cm; 4 pairs of medium strips can hold one frame weighing up to 5 kg, and measuring up to 45 cm by 60 cm; 4 pairs of large strips can hold one frame weighing up to 7 kg, and measuring up to 60 cm by 90 cm
RECOMMENDED SURFACES: Command strips hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles

PACKAGING: Packaging for this item is made with FSC Mix certified fibre with minimum of 90% recycled content; All glues and varnishes used to produce the packaging are solvent-free; The packaging is 100% recyclable in existing household waste streams; Packaging may vary
INCLUDES: 8 Pairs of Medium (19 mm x 70 mm), 8 Pairs of Large (19 mm x 93 mm), White Command Picture Hanging Strips (32 Strips total)
Warnings: Do not hang over beds; Do not use on wallpapers, delicate or weak surfaces; Do not hang valuable items; Failure to follow instructions may result in damage or injury

GENUINE QUALITY : Whether your Command Picture Hanging Strips come with a green printed or transparent liner, rest assured they are authentic Command products, offering the same reliable performance for all your picture hanging needs

Indoor use only. Recommended for use on painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles; Hang picture frames, wall art, small mirrors, wall clocks, signs, dry erase boards and other home decor
